text: Khi app chay trong Docker Compose, ket noi database nen dung ten service (vi du: db) thay vi localhost.
Neu API timeout bat thuong, uu tien them timeout ro rang, retry co gioi han, va exponential backoff de tranh qua tai.
Khi user sua thong tin profile, gia tri moi nhat can overwrite gia tri cu de tranh memory mau thuan.
Neu context vuot ngan sach token, can trim theo uu tien: profile quan trong, episodic moi nhat, semantic lien quan nhat, va recent turns.
Sau su co on-call, nen luu episodic memory voi summary, nguyen nhan goc, cach fix, va action items de truy hoi sau.
Thong tin nhay cam trong profile can co consent, thoi han luu tru (TTL), va co co che xoa theo yeu cau nguoi dung.
